title: LightNewbie
description: grant protection to players who join the server for the first time
body:
![w](https://8upload.com/image/bf1cae1724381047/lightnewbiewww.png)

## LightNewbie: 
**Ultimate Protection for New Players on Your Minecraft Server**

LightNewbie is a lightweight and powerful plugin designed to give new players a safe and seamless start on your Minecraft server. With customizable protection features and optimized performance, it ensures newcomers feel welcome and integrate effortlessly into your community.

---
## Features

**New Player Protection:** Automatically grant new players a configurable period of invulnerability, shielding them from damage by other players, mobs, or explosions while they explore.

**Restricted Worlds:** Prevent protected players from entering specified worlds, keeping them in safe zones as defined in the config.

**Confirmation System:** Players can disable their protection using a user-friendly confirmation system with clickable commands and sound effects, toggleable via the config.

**Protection Reminders:** Display remaining protection time through action bar messages to keep players informed.

**WorldGuard Integration:** Prevent protected players from entering regions with the 'newbie' flag set to deny, keeping them in safe zones as defined by your WorldGuard configuration.

**Flexible Configuration:** Customize protection duration, world restrictions, sounds, messages, and more to suit your server’s needs.

**Lightweight Performance:** Designed for minimal server impact, ensuring smooth operation even on busy servers.

---
## Why LightNewbie?
LightNewbie is the perfect choice for server owners who want to create a welcoming environment for new players. Whether you run a survival, boxpvp etc..., or custom server, features like restricted worlds and the confirmation system make it easy to use and highly effective. Protect your new players and make their experience unforgettable from day one.

---
